headline: Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) to Cut 14% of Workforce
summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) is one of the 10 Best ARK Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 5, Bloomberg reported that Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) will cut about 14% of its workforce as it moves to manage costs and adapt to AI-driven changes. Roughly 700 roles will go, with most reductions landing in the […]
